title: ANS Resolution Response
description: Response returned when resolving an ANS ID to an endpoint

endpoint.description: The primary endpoint URL for this agent

transport.description: Supported transports in order of preference

trust_score_confidence.description: Confidence in the trust score based on available data (0=no data, 1=high confidence)

certificate_valid.description: Whether the agent's registry certificate is currently valid

certificate.description: The JWT certificate (if certificate_valid is true)

public_key.description: The agent's Ed25519 public key for request/response verification

status.description: Current operational status based on most recent heartbeat

last_heartbeat_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent heartbeat from this agent

ttl.description: Cache TTL in seconds. Callers should not re-resolve before TTL expires unless required.

resolved_by.description: The registry node URL that resolved this query (may differ from query target in federation)
